ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precipitation record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
